title: Progress Test
objectives: Assess vocabulary from Unit 6 (weather, seasons, camping, fashion)
Test reading comprehension about seasons and weather
Evaluate grammar: past simple (was/were) and comparative adjectives
Assess guided writing about going to the park

exercises.problem: The ............ takes nice photos. (a. photographer, b. desert, c. camping)
Flowers usually ............ in spring. (a. fast, b. bloom, c. forget)
In winter, the weather is ............ (a. poor, b. new, c. windy)
My favourite ............ is summer. (a. diary, b. season, c. fashion)
Read: 'There are four seasons in a year: autumn, winter, spring, and summer...' The best title: (a. Kuwait Activities, b. Camping, c. Weather And Seasons)
The underlined word 'it' in line 5 refers to: (a. spring, b. winter, c. weather)
In spring, people usually go to the: (a. farm, b. beach, c. desert)
Why do families in Kuwait like camping in winter?
exercises.answer: Because the air is fresh and the nights are long.

exercises.problem: A giraffe is ............ a sheep. (a. tall, b. taller, c. taller than)
It ............ cloudy yesterday. (a. was, b. has, c. were)
Hamad and Fahad ............ at the zoo last Monday. (a. are, b. were, c. have)
Write a paragraph about 'Going to the Park' with guide words: go-park, ride-bike, weather-sunny
exercises.answer: Last weekend, we went to the park. We rode our bikes. The weather was sunny. It was a great day.

exercises.problem: Complete: 1. The weather was __________ yesterday. 2. There are four __________ in a year. 3. I write in my __________ everyday.

teaching_notes: Progress test covers all Unit 6 skills. Reading passage about four seasons tests comprehension and reference words. Grammar section tests both was/were and comparative adjectives. Writing requires a guided paragraph with past tense.
